name: sab_preoder
displayDescription: Backend API server for SAB merchandise preorder management. Needed to streamline order collection for student org fundraisers and event merchandise. Works as a REST API handling order CRUD, payment tracking, and email confirmations. Contains Express.js server with Zod validation, Mongoose/MySQL data layer, and Nodemailer email service. Used by HCMUS SAB officers managing merchandise campaigns. Built with TypeScript, Express.js, MongoDB/MySQL, Docker.
